headline: Updates that install themselves
summary: Aster can now verify, install, and relaunch updates without asking you to replace the app manually.

features.title: Update and restart
features.description: After downloading an update, Aster replaces the installed copy and reopens the new version automatically.

features.title: Verified before replacement
features.description: Aster checks the signed feed, checksum, app identity, version, architecture, and code signature before installation.

features.title: A safe fallback
features.description: If Aster cannot replace itself, it keeps the verified DMG and opens it for manual installation instead.
